entities.name: NCT03611582
entities.context: STEP 3 (NCT03611582): Phase 3 interventional study of semaglutide plus intensive lifestyle program for weight reduction

attributes.descriptive_title: Research Study to Look at How Well Semaglutide is at Lowering Weight When Taken Together With an Intensive Lifestyle Program

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase: PHASE3 as listed in the trial record

entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: Semaglutide, a GLP-1 receptor agonist, administered as subcutaneous injections once weekly at escalating doses up to 2.4 mg

entities.name: Semaglutide 2.4 mg QW s.c. + intensive behavioural therapy
entities.context: Experimental arm: semaglutide 2.4 mg during 68-week treatment period in addition to intensive behavioural therapy

entities.name: Placebo (semaglutide) + intensive behavioural therapy
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: semaglutide placebo during 68-week treatment period in addition to intensive behavioural therapy

entities.name: Intensive Behavioural Therapy
entities.context: Intensive lifestyle program including counselling on healthy food choices, physical activity, and initial low-calorie diet; administered to all participants

attributes.components: Dietary counselling, physical activity guidance, low-calorie diet for first 2 months

entities.name: Arm A: Semaglutide 2.4 mg QW
entities.context: Experimental arm: participants receive semaglutide 2.4 mg once weekly plus intensive behavioural therapy for 68 weeks

entities.name: Arm B: Semaglutide Placebo
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: participants receive semaglutide placebo once weekly plus intensive behavioural therapy for 68 weeks

entities.name: Obesity
entities.context: Condition listed: Obesity; participants required to have BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with weight-related comorbidities

entities.name: Overweight
entities.context: Condition listed: Overweight; participants with BMI ≥27 kg/m² with at least one weight-related comorbidity eligible

entities.name: Novo Nordisk A/S
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Novo Nordisk A/S

entities.name: change in body weight (%)
entities.context: Primary endpoint: change in body weight (%) from baseline (week 0) to week 68

entities.name: proportion of participants achieving ≥5% body weight reduction
entities.context: Primary endpoint: number of participants achieving ≥5% weight loss after 68 weeks

entities.name: proportion of participants achieving ≥10% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: participants achieving ≥10% body weight reduction after 68 weeks

entities.name: proportion of participants achieving ≥15% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: participants achieving ≥15% body weight reduction after 68 weeks

entities.name: proportion of participants achieving ≥20% body weight reduction
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: participants achieving ≥20% body weight reduction after 68 weeks

entities.name: change in waist circumference
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in waist circumference from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in systolic blood pressure
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in systolic blood pressure from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in SF-36 physical functioning score
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in Short Form-36 (SF-36) physical functioning score from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in body weight (kg)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in body weight in kg from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in body mass index
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in body mass index from baseline to week 68

entities.name: change in HbA1c
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in HbA1c (% and mmol/mol) from baseline to week 68

entities.name: BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with weight-related comorbidity
entities.context: Inclusion criterion: BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with hypertension, dyslipidaemia, obstructive sleep apnoea, or cardiovascular disease

entities.name: HbA1c <48 mmol/mol (6.5%)
entities.context: Exclusion criterion: HbA1c ≥48 mmol/mol (6.5%) at screening excludes participants (i.e., non-diabetic population required)

entities.name: Adults with overweight or obesity without diabetes, BMI ≥27 kg/m²
entities.context: Adults ≥18 years with BMI ≥30 or ≥27 with comorbidities, HbA1c <48 mmol/mol, history of unsuccessful dietary weight loss effort

relations.evidence: Phase: PHASE3 as listed in the trial record
Lead Sponsor: Novo Nordisk A/S
Experimental arm evaluates semaglutide 2.4 mg once weekly subcutaneous injection

relations.target_entity: Semaglutide 2.4 mg QW s.c. + intensive behavioural therapy
relations.evidence: Experimental arm: semaglutide 2.4 mg during 68-week treatment period in addition to intensive behavioural therapy
All participants receive intensive behavioural therapy including dietary counselling and physical activity guidance
Study investigates weight reduction in participants with obesity (BMI ≥30 kg/m²)
Study investigates weight reduction in participants with overweight (BMI ≥27 kg/m² with comorbidities)
Semaglutide evaluated for treatment of obesity in STEP 3 trial
Semaglutide evaluated for treatment of overweight with comorbidities in STEP 3 trial
Primary endpoint: change in body weight (%) from baseline to week 68

relations.target_entity: proportion of participants achieving ≥5% body weight reduction
relations.evidence: Primary endpoint: number of participants achieving ≥5% weight loss after 68 weeks

relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: participants achieving ≥10% body weight reduction after 68 weeks

relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: participants achieving ≥15% body weight reduction after 68 weeks

relations.target_entity: proportion of participants achieving ≥20% body weight reduction
relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: participants achieving ≥20% body weight reduction after 68 weeks
Secondary endpoint: change in waist circumference from baseline to week 68
Secondary endpoint: change in systolic blood pressure from baseline to week 68

relations.target_entity: change in SF-36 physical functioning score
relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: change in SF-36 physical functioning score from baseline to week 68
Secondary endpoint: change in body weight in kg from baseline to week 68
Secondary endpoint: change in body mass index from baseline to week 68
Secondary endpoint: change in HbA1c (% and mmol/mol) from baseline to week 68

relations.target_entity: BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with weight-related comorbidity
relations.evidence: Inclusion criterion: BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with weight-related comorbidity required for enrollment
Exclusion criterion: HbA1c ≥48 mmol/mol (6.5%) at screening excludes participants

relations.target_entity: Adults with overweight or obesity without diabetes, BMI ≥27 kg/m²
relations.evidence: Enrolled adults ≥18 years with BMI ≥30 or ≥27 with comorbidities, HbA1c <48 mmol/mol, history of unsuccessful dietary weight loss
Experimental arm: participants receive semaglutide 2.4 mg once weekly plus intensive behavioural therapy
Placebo comparator arm: participants receive semaglutide placebo once weekly plus intensive behavioural therapy
Semaglutide administered together with intensive behavioural therapy in the experimental arm
